name: Apple Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the whole wheat flour, white enriched flour, salt, and brown sugar.
2. In another bowl, whisk together the milk and eggs until well combined.
3. Pour the liquid ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just mixed.
4. Gently fold in the diced apples.
5. Heat a large skillet over medium heat and lightly grease with butter or oil.
6. Drop spoonfuls of batter onto the hot skillet, spreading to desired thickness.
7. Cook until bubbles form on the surface and edges are set, about 2-3 minutes per side.
8. Remove from heat and serve immediately.
